title: Teladoc Health reports $1B loss in 2024, driven by BetterHelp Q2 impairment charge
text: Teladoc Health 2024 Financial Results - $1B Loss Driven by BetterHelp Impairment. Full Year 2024 Revenue: $2.569 billion (1% decrease YoY vs $2.6B in 2023). Access fees revenue decreased 3% to $2.2B, other revenue grew 11% to $354M. International revenue grew 12%, U.S. revenue fell 3%. Segment Performance: Integrated Care revenue up 2% to $390.7M in Q4 2024 with strong margin expansion. BetterHelp segment revenue down 10% to $249.8M. Goodwill Impairment: Q2 2024 included $790M goodwill impairment on BetterHelp, contributing to $1B full-year loss. Partnerships: Expanded connected care partnerships in 2024 across digestive health, centers of excellence, fertility, family building. Partnership with Brightline for pediatric virtual behavioral health. Health Plan Channel: Experiencing pressures creating headwinds for segment growth.
